name: metro-mcp
description: Plugin-based MCP server for React Native runtime debugging, inspection, and automation via Metro/CDP

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:js && bun run build:bin && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun build src/index.ts src/client/index.ts src/plugin.ts --outdir dist --target node --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod
scripts.build:bin: bun build bin/metro-mcp.ts --outfile dist/bin/metro-mcp.js --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod && chmod +x dist/bin/metro-mcp.js

author: Stephen Radford
